scripts.deploy:cloudflare-build: node scripts/prepare-cloudflare-build-config.mjs && node scripts/apply-d1-migrations.mjs orange-replay-idx-00-prod --config apps/worker/wrangler.cloudflare-build.jsonc --env production --env-file apps/worker/wrangler.production.env --remote && vp exec --filter @orange-replay/worker -- wrangler deploy --config wrangler.cloudflare-build.jsonc --env production --env-file wrangler.production.env --minify --keep-vars
scripts.deploy:prod: node scripts/check-prod-secret.mjs && node scripts/build-deploy.mjs && node scripts/apply-d1-migrations.mjs orange-replay-idx-00-prod --env production --env-file apps/worker/wrangler.production.env --remote && vp exec --filter @orange-replay/worker -- wrangler deploy --env production --env-file wrangler.production.env --minify && node scripts/smoke-prod-api.mjs
scripts.deploy:prod:dry-run: node scripts/build-deploy.mjs && vp exec --filter @orange-replay/worker -- wrangler deploy --env production --env-file wrangler.production.env --dry-run --outdir dist/prod-dry-run
scripts.ready: vp check && vp run -r test && vp run -r build
